name: bogibox Golf Hudson
about: bogibox Golf Hudson is a member-only golf simulator facility that provides 24/7 access to private and open golf sessions. The venue operates with a focus on creating a comfortable, private environment similar to a personal clubhouse, emphasizing exclusive use for members. It is equipped with top-of-the-line TrackMan technology and is designed for individuals and groups looking for a customizable golfing experience without public walk-in access.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusive member-only environment with luxury amenities
